scenarios.name: misread_metric
scenarios.response_text:
B

The new flow removed 4 steps, including the 'first milestone' (the activation metric trigger). This changes what “completion” means: old completion was based on a longer, 8-step flow and activation at the milestone, while the new flow defines completion after 5 steps with a different activation point. This makes the 60% vs 85% comparison misleading.
